famous quote:
"Do not waste time bothering whether you 'love' your neighbor; act as if you did. As soon as we do this we find one of the great secrets. When you are behaving as if you loved someone, you will presently come to love him."
-- C.S. Lewis (Mere Christianity)
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 5)

One of the times she feels closest to the Lord is during worship. She doesn't think that the South does this well. She grew up as a pastor's kid in Wisconsin. There were moments where as a kid she just said, "Jesus, just tell me something about yourself." He would say, "Well I'm a peacemaker." Or "I'm for you." Or "I have always been in love with my people." Or "There is not a day that goes by that I do not think about you." She says, "I know this is weird too but growing up I loved to sit on the roof in the middle of the night, looking at the stars, and talking to the Lord."
Music Video Instructions: When God seems silent, sing this to him. But then think of him singing it to you, waiting for you to respond to him.
Music Video Description: Say something I'm giving up on you
